title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 3 of 1996
text: GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY 01' AGRICULTURE [DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCI I AND EDUCATION Central Agricultural University.
